title: This Is What a Rainbow Valley Looks Like

scenes.text: These mountains look like a painted canvas.
This is Zhangye Danxia, located in Gansu Province, China.
The vibrant colors come from red sandstone and mineral deposits formed over millions of years.
Each layer tells a story of Earth’s past.
scenes.label: EACH LAYER TELLS A STORY

scenes.text: Follow for the planet's best-kept secrets.

description: 📍 Zhangye Danxia, Gansu Province - China. Witness breathtaking formations that resemble a rainbow-painted landscape born from geological wonders. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
